events.title: Speed Dating For Singles Ages 25-45
events.description: Find love with in-person singles and matchmaking events curated by locals. Go on at least eight 5-minute dates in one night, matched with the most compatible people in the room!

events.title: Holiday Night Market: Carols, Community & Celebration
events.description: The Holiday Night Market is a festive evening event designed to bring the community together through shopping, music, and holiday cheer. Featuring live carolers, a roaming Black Santa, local vendors, the market offers families and individuals a joyful alternative to traditional holiday shopping. Its purpose is to support women- and minority-owned small businesses while creating a memorable seasonal tradition for the Indianapolis community.

events.title: Laser Engraving Class: Certification & Leather Keychain
events.description:
This session is designed to blend hands-on learning with creativity, catering to both beginners and advanced enthusiasts. 

What You’ll Learn and Do:

Comprehensive Training: Get certified in operating two state-of-the-art laser engravers – the Boss HP3655 and the Epilog Mini 24. The Boss HP3655 features a large 33.5″ x 55″ cut size with a 150-watt laser, perfect for bigger projects. Meanwhile, the compact Epilog Mini 24, with its 12″ x 24″ cut size and 60-watt laser, is ideal for smaller, intri

events.title: Free Design Seminar - Laser Cut Holiday Ornaments
events.description:
Celebrate the season with creativity at Machyne Makerspace! 
In this free design seminar, you’ll learn how to create your own custom holiday ornaments using the precision of laser cutting. 
What You’ll Learn: 

Design basics using Adobe Illustrator
How to prepare files for laser cutting
Hands-on use of Machyne’s CNC Laser Cutter

Create and take home your personalized holiday ornament! Perfect for gifts, decorating your home, or just getting into the festive spirit—this class is open to all and

events.title: Big Gay Valentines
events.description:
The Big Gay Valentine Market returns February 7-8, 2026, at The Amp at 16 Tech, celebrating love in all its forms with the bold theme “Queer Love is Revolutionary.” Hosted by Indy Gay Market, this two-day event brings together over 100 LGBTQIA2S+ artists, makers, and community partners for a weekend full of creativity, connection, and joy. 
Attendees can expect a vibrant celebration of queer artistry and affection — from handmade gifts and romantic keepsakes to art that uplifts and inspires. Whe

events.title: Launch Fishers Thanksgiving Community Pitch-In
events.description:
This event is open to LAUNCH FISHERS MEMBERS ONLY. 
Gobble til you wobble! 🦃 Come join your fellow Launch Fishers members at the family table for our annual Thanksgiving pitch-in. Let’s toast to our incredible community with good food and camaraderie, as we feast together in celebration of everything the season represents. Members can sign up to bring a dish via the link on Nexudus or Slack.

events.title: Free Cowork Friday: November 2025
events.description:
One Friday a month, we open our doors to anyone interested in trying out coworking! Potential new members can come in and enjoy free coffee & coworking as they test drive what a Launch Fishers membership is all about. We provide a reliable place to work for all sorts of people: entrepreneurs, remote workers, consultants, and more! 
Benefits of Launch Fishers membership: a comfortable workspace, a great community of fellow coworkers, phone booths, meeting & conference rooms, in-house coffee shop,

events.title: Holiday Sweet Swap
events.description:
This event is open to LAUNCH FISHERS MEMBERS ONLY. 
Treats are always best when shared. Which is why we absolutely love our sweetest annual tradition: the Holiday Sweet Swap! Each year, we gather in the main space around RISE Coffee Shop to swap delicious treats. Participants bring 2-3 dozen of their favorite individual treats (i.e. cookies, bars, serving of a “grab-able” goodie, etc.) to share. Each participant will then get a box to fill with their very own custom assortment of goodies to take

events.title: Coffee & Conversation: December 2025
events.description:
Mornings are better when we get together. ☕️

Imagine starting your day with a vibrant buzz, not just from your coffee, but from connecting with fellow local innovators. Our monthly Coffee & Conversation event is designed to do just that.
Join us on the second Thursday of every month at 8:30 AM for an energetic networking session. You’ll enjoy free coffee and delicious donuts while making valuable connections that can help propel your business forward.

events.title: H7 Network, Noblesville, IN
events.description:
H7 Indianapolis IN Business Networking
**Perkins**
*250 Noble Creek Dr., Noblesville, IN 46060, USA*

**H7 Noblesville** is our weekly networking meeting open to local B2B and B2C professionals. Experience the distinct, structural, difference from other networking groups, associations, and chambers. Our community of meetings are led by Champion Leadership.

***All meetings welcome visitors, we'd love to show you what we're all about!***
